body:
traveler-bri:

You and me, a road trip to somewhere…anywhere. We’ll get our favorite snacks and drinks at gas stations. Blasting our playlists with the windows down while we drive the stretch of road. My hand on your thigh as you sit in the passenger seat singing along to the music. Eventually you’ll fall asleep with your head leaning on my hoodie as a makeshift pillow. I’ll be left to my thoughts thinking, “I wouldn’t want to be anywhere else”.


When we reach the hotel room both of us plopping down onto the bed exhausted from the drive. Small tired kisses turns into slow deeper kisses; before we know it we’re both lost in each other’s eyes and touches. Yeah, a road trip sounds nice.

This is a lesbian blog, men and minors DNI🚫
